scripts.deploy-config:schema:generate: toolkit_dir="${DEPLOY_CONFIG_SCHEMA_TOOLKIT_DIR:-/tmp/personal-stack-deploy-config-schema-toolkit}"; if [ -z "${DEPLOY_CONFIG_SCHEMA_LOCAL:-}" ]; then npm install --no-save --prefix "$toolkit_dir" @extratoast/deploy-config-schema@^0.4.0 && export DEPLOY_CONFIG_SCHEMA_LOCAL="$toolkit_dir/node_modules/@extratoast/deploy-config-schema"; fi; node platform/scripts/deploy-config-schema/fleet-to-deploy-config.mjs platform/inventory/fleet.yaml
scripts.deploy-config:schema:validate: toolkit_dir="${DEPLOY_CONFIG_SCHEMA_TOOLKIT_DIR:-/tmp/personal-stack-deploy-config-schema-toolkit}" work_dir="${DEPLOY_CONFIG_SCHEMA_WORK_DIR:-/tmp/personal-stack-deploy-config-schema}"; mkdir -p "$work_dir" && npm install --no-save --prefix "$toolkit_dir" @extratoast/deploy-config-schema@^0.4.0 && DEPLOY_CONFIG_SCHEMA_LOCAL="$toolkit_dir/node_modules/@extratoast/deploy-config-schema" node platform/scripts/deploy-config-schema/fleet-to-deploy-config.mjs platform/inventory/fleet.yaml > "$work_dir/deploy-config.json" && "$toolkit_dir/node_modules/.bin/deploy-config-schema" validate deploy-config "$work_dir/deploy-config.json"
